headline: NextEra Energy Faces Risk Oversight Questions As Chief Officer Plans Exit
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) announced that chief risk officer Terrell Kirk Crews II plans to resign effective March 20, 2026. No successor or interim chief risk officer has been named, leaving a leadership gap in risk management. The move raises questions about how risk oversight will be handled during an active period for large energy and infrastructure projects. NextEra Energy, a major US utility and renewable power company, sits at the center of the energy transition with large scale...
